---
title: "7b_variant_calling_atac_deepseq"
---

# Downloading new cram file for deepseq 

Date: Apr 1 2026
from dropbox link shared by Jeff since the previous one was corrupted.
Added this to the end of the link ?dl=1

cd 
curl -L -C - --progress-bar --retry 10 --retry-delay 10 -o "D1942_deepseq.cram" "https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/313w6qb3va06uk93mqobs/AKzmqJLdKFN46wbnFn2exdU?dl=0&e=1&preview=419272-D01942_NG06549_AT-Z0005-CATGTATCCTCTGAT.cram&rlkey=zlm35qrmh2gw53l0t8tzlo8eb&st=o8qa8x2m?dl=1"

sambamba view -t 16 -f bam -S D1942_deepseq.cram -o D1942_deepseq.bam
samtools view -@ 16 -T /projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac/Data/hg38_resources/Homo_sapiens_assembly38.fasta -b D1942_deepseq.cram > D1942_deepseq.bam
samtools view -H D1942_deepseq.bam | grep "@HD"
sambamba index -t 8 D1942_deepseq.bam

# Preprocessing 

cat > /projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac/Data/variant_calling/deepseq_bam_list.txt << 'EOF'
deepseq,/projectnb/paxlab/DATA/DriesSpatial/Atlasxomics/D1942/D1942_deepseq/processed_data/D1942_deepseq.bam 
EOF


```{bash}
#!/bin/bash -l

#$ -P paxlab            # Specify the SCC project name you want to use
#$ -l h_rt=24:00:00     # Specify the hard time limit for the job
#$ -N preprocess        # Give job a name
#$ -l mem_per_core=8G  # Request memory per core (adjust as needed)
#$ -pe omp 16           # Request 8 cores for parallel processing
#$ -o /projectnb/paxlab/presh/src/Spatial_ATAC_analysis/qsub_logs  # Specify the path for standard output logs
#$ -e /projectnb/paxlab/presh/src/Spatial_ATAC_analysis/qsub_logs  # Specify the path for error logs

path="/projectnb/paxlab/presh/software/Monopogen" # where Monopogen is downloaded
export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=$LD_LIBRARY_PATH:${path}/apps
python ${path}/src/Monopogen.py  preProcess --help

python ${path}/src/Monopogen.py preProcess \
  -b /projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac/Data/variant_calling/deepseq_bam_list.txt \
  -o /projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac/Data/variant_calling/deepseq \
  -a ${path}/apps -t 8

```




```{bash}
cd /projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac/Data/variant_calling/deepseq/Bam

module load samtools
echo -e "File\tMean_Coverage" > mean_coverage.txt
for f in *.bam; do
    echo "Processing $f"
    mean_cov=$(samtools depth "$f" | awk '{
        sum += $3; cnt++
    } END {
        if (cnt > 0) printf "%.6f\n", sum/cnt;
        else print "0"
    }')
    echo -e "${f}\t${mean_cov}" >> mean_coverage.txt
done

```


# Germline Variant calling with Monopogen

```{bash}
# --- config ---
MONOPOGEN_PATH="/projectnb/paxlab/presh/software/Monopogen"

OUT_DIR="/projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac/Data/variant_calling/deepseq"
REF_FA="/projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac/Data/hg38_resources/Homo_sapiens_assembly38.fasta"

REGION_LST="${MONOPOGEN_PATH}/resource/GRCh38.region.lst"
# Use your canonical region list if preferred
# REGION_LST="/projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac/Data/variant_calling/GRCh38.chr1_22_X_Y.region.lst"
WORK_DIR="/projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac/Data/variant_calling/deepseq"
REF_FA="/projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac/Data/hg38_resources/Homo_sapiens_assembly38.fasta"
IMPUTATION_PANEL="/projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac/Data/variant_calling/phased_hg38_1000G_ref/"
STEP="all"
THREADS="${NSLOTS:-16}"

# --- env ---
module load python3
export LD_LIBRARY_PATH="${LD_LIBRARY_PATH}:${MONOPOGEN_PATH}/apps"

mkdir -p "${OUT_DIR}"
cd "${WORK_DIR}"

# --- run ---
python "${MONOPOGEN_PATH}/src/Monopogen.py" germline \
  -r "${REGION_LST}" \
  -s "${STEP}" \
  -o "${OUT_DIR}" \
  -g "${REF_FA}" \
  -p "${IMPUTATION_PANEL}" \
  -a "${MONOPOGEN_PATH}/apps" \
  -t "${THREADS}"  --norun TRUE

echo "Done: ${OUT_DIR}"

```

```{bash}

cd Script
for f in runGermline_*.sh; do
  {
    echo "#!/bin/bash -l"
    echo "#$ -P paxlab"
    echo "#$ -pe omp 4"
    echo "#$ -l h_rt=24:00:00"
    echo "#$ -l mem_per_core=8G"
    echo "source ~/.bashrc"
    echo "module load samtools/1.12"
    echo "module load htslib/1.21"
    sed 's|/projectnb/paxlab/presh/software/Monopogen/apps/bcftools|/projectnb/paxlab/presh/software/bcftools_1.8/bcftools|g; s| /projectnb/paxlab/presh/software/Monopogen/apps/bgzip|bgzip|g' "$f"
  } > "${f}.tmp" && mv "${f}.tmp" "$f" && chmod +x "$f"
done
```


## running all scripts 


```{bash}
for f in runGermline_*.sh; do
  # Extract job name from filename (remove .sh and use as job ID)
  job_name=${f%.sh}
  job_name=${job_name//:/_}  # Replace colons with underscores
  qsub -V -N "$job_name" "$f"
done

```


## I need to merge chromosome chunks first -> 

```{bash}
#!/bin/bash
# merge_chr_chunks.sh -- merge all per-chunk chrN:*-*.gl.vcf.gz into 1 per chrN.gl.vcf.gz


module load htslib/1.16
module load bcftools/1.16


for CHR in {1..22}; do
    # Find all chunked files for this chromosome, sorted in natural order
    FILES=$(ls chr${CHR}:*.gl.vcf.gz 2>/dev/null | sort -V)
    
    if [[ -z "$FILES" ]]; then
        echo "No files found for chr${CHR}, skipping."
        continue
    fi
    
    echo "Merging for chr${CHR}:"
    echo "$FILES"
    
    # Concatenate using bcftools
    bcftools concat -Oz $FILES -o chr${CHR}.gl.vcf.gz
    
    # Index the merged VCF
    tabix -p vcf chr${CHR}.gl.vcf.gz
done
```



```{bash}
#!/bin/bash
# simple_merge.sh

for CHR in {1..22}; do
    CHUNKS=$(ls chr${CHR}:*phased.vcf.gz 2>/dev/null | sort -V)
    
    if [[ -z "$CHUNKS" ]]; then
        echo "Skipping chr${CHR}: no chunks found."
        continue
    fi
    
    OUTPUT="chr${CHR}.phased.vcf.gz"
    echo "Merging chr${CHR}..."
    
    # Use --naive-force to ignore header mismatches
    bcftools concat -Oz --naive-force $CHUNKS -o "$OUTPUT"
    tabix -p vcf "$OUTPUT"
    
    echo "Done: $OUTPUT"
done

```

## Merge all phased VCF files into one!

```{bash}
#!/bin/bash
# merge_all_chr_phased.sh -- merge all chrN.phased.vcf.gz (1-22) into one combined file

set -euo pipefail

module load htslib/1.16
module load bcftools/1.16

# Change to working directory with VCF files
cd /projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac/Data/variant_calling/deepseq/germline

# Collect all phased VCF files for chromosomes 1-22
echo "Collecting phased VCF files for chromosomes 1-22..."
VCF_FILES=""
for CHR in {1..22}; do
    VCF_FILE="chr${CHR}.phased.vcf.gz"
    if [[ -f "$VCF_FILE" ]]; then
        echo "  Found: $VCF_FILE"
        VCF_FILES="$VCF_FILES $VCF_FILE"
    else
        echo "  WARNING: $VCF_FILE not found!"
    fi
done

if [[ -z "$VCF_FILES" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: No phased VCF files found!"
    exit 1
fi

# Merge all VCF files
OUTPUT="combined.phased.vcf.gz"
echo ""
echo "Merging all chromosome phased VCFs into: $OUTPUT"

bcftools concat -Oz $VCF_FILES -o "$OUTPUT"

# Index the merged VCF
echo "Indexing merged VCF..."
tabix -p vcf "$OUTPUT"

echo "Done! Created:"
echo "  - $OUTPUT"
echo "  - ${OUTPUT}.tbi"


```




# somatic variant calling with Monopogen

Look at somatic_final.sh

And then run individual somatic_chr shell files !

cd /projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac/analysis/src/variant_calling/monopgen/deepseq
bash submit_chr_jobs.sh
for f in somatic_chr/qsub_*.sh; do qsub "$f"; done

qstat -u $USER | awk 'NR>2 {print $1}' | xargs -r qdel
